He has almost served out his substantive sentence for life, therefore, on the basis of the facts and circumstances of the case, the petitioner is entitled for the benefit of Section 397 Cr.P.C. Under Section 397 Cr.P.C., the Court has power to direct that the sentences awarded to the petitioner in the other FIRs shall run concurrently. In Mst. Shahista Bibi2, this Court has held that the sentences of imprisonment or that of life imprisonment awarded at the same trial or in two different trials have to run concurrently.
